description: Long-term context substrate for coding agents (CLI).
_comment: Lives in the Scoop bucket repo cloud-dancer-labs/scoop-celeborn as bucket/celeborn.json. Install: scoop bucket add celeborn https://github.com/cloud-dancer-labs/scoop-celeborn; scoop install celeborn. Since 0.3.0 the asset is the compiled all-rights-reserved tarball on celeborn-releases (Scoop extracts .tar.gz natively); hash = the tarball's sha256 from the release's SHA256SUMS. License ships inside the tarball. checkver watches celeborn-releases (not celeborn-code — that repo's tags now version the thin installer).
